Zomato Restaurant Sales & Performance real data, no ML fabrication

Zomato Bangalore Restaurants dataset (Kaggle, 51,717 real scraped listings). No sales/order data exists in this source, so "votes" (ratings received) is used as a clearly-labeled popularity proxy throughout - never presented as revenue.

Source: Zomato Bangalore Restaurants (Kaggle, himanshupoddar), 51,717 rows, single scrape snapshot, no dates/customer IDs. "Votes" = number of ratings received, used only as a popularity proxy, not a real order/revenue count.
